text: Alright team, we need to figure out the demo for Thursday's client meeting.
I think we should lead with the dashboard. The new charts look solid.
Agreed. I can have the live data feed hooked up by Wednesday if we freeze the schema tonight.
Let's do that. Rachel, can you prep the slide deck to frame the dashboard walkthrough?
On it. I'll pull from the last QBR deck and update the numbers.
Hey unrelated, but has anyone looked at the staging server? I'm getting 502s on every request since this morning.
Vince, should we include the export feature in the demo or is that too risky? It's still a bit flaky.
Leave it out. Let's only show things we know won't break in front of the client.
I just checked — the staging box ran out of disk. Logs filled up the volume. I'm clearing them now.
Good, make sure it's stable. We'll need staging for the demo dry run on Wednesday.
Disk cleared, services are coming back up. Should be good in a few minutes.
Perfect. Rachel, send the deck draft around tomorrow so we can review before Wednesday.
